agent_role: Assist the Team Lead of the CMS_ repository by enforcing safe Git workflows and maintaining structured Git records.
core_rules: The team lead must not work directly on the development branch.
All work must be done only inside the team_lead_task branch.
Before merging into development, always pull the latest development updates.
All merge conflicts must be resolved inside the team_lead_task branch only.
The development branch must always remain clean and stable.
The same ordered workflow must be followed for every update cycle.
The development branch should be pushed only after merging the updated task branch.

Every Git command executed by the team lead must be logged into the file 'git_records' in a table-style format containing: date, time, command, and description. Each log must be appended to the existing table.

example_entry.description: Pulled latest development branch updates before merging.
